name: Speedy Little Devils
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine melted butter and dry cake mix (let butter cool down a couple of minutes before adding to dry mix). The mixture should be crumbly.
2. If the butter is too hot, the result will be a sticky mass rather than a crumbly mixture.
3. Reserve 1 - 1/2 cups of this mixture for topping.
4. Pat the remaining crumb mixture into an ungreased 9 x 13 pan.
5. Combine peanut butter and marshmallow cream and spread evenly over the crumb mixture in the pan.
6. Crumble the reserved 1 - 1/2 cups of cake mixture over the peanut butter/marshmallow creme layer.
7. Bake for 20 minutes at 350°F.
8. Let cool, cut into bars, and serve one piece at a time.
9. Makes 3 dozen bars.
